_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenetic reprogramming shapes the cellular landscape of schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: APOD or SOX6 were suppressed in HEI-193 cells using CRISPRi, which each attenuated schwannoma cell proliferation compared to cells expressing sgNTC
details: CRISPRi suppression of APOD or SOX6 attenuated schwannoma cell proliferation compared to cells expressing sgNTC
